prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2021–2026年连续排名第2名，稳居全国顶尖学府之列，办学层次和综合实力处于最高梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档、食堂宿舍等舆情事件；但抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量和互动量极高，反映社会关注度持续旺盛；2025年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次出现空档），但整体未影响北大顶尖地位；北京大学拥有A+学科数量居全国前列，代表性A+学科包括数学、物理学、计算机科学与技术、电子科学与技术、软件工程、化学、生物学、法学、中国语言文学、经济学等，与物理类招生专业（理科试验班类，含数学类等）高度关联，学科实力为全国顶尖水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等理工类专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐或推荐，社会报考热度高；重庆市2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，较2025年略有下降，物理类考生数估算约13.7万（较2025年约13.95万小幅减少），竞争压力略有缓和，2025年物理类本科批425分、特殊类型招生控制线498分，近年稳中有升；北京大学位于北京（非本省），在重庆市的招生占比约2.5%（2025年），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；重庆考生对北京高校的地域偏好较强，北大作为顶尖学府吸引力不受地域影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年小幅后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招33.3%（显著增加录取名额，推动位次数字增大）、物理类考生数略有减少以及北大顶尖学科实力与高热社会关注度；扩招是影响2026年录取位次的最关键因素，预计位次将从2025年159名后移至约159名，区间141–241名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京大学在重庆物理类仅设理科试验班类一个招生专业（大类招生，含数学、物理、化学、生物、地质、环境等多个方向），实际录取按大类投档，入校后分流。预测位次约191名，区间141–241名，位次在区间下限（141名以内）可大胆冲刺；位次在区间中段（约191名）属正常范围，录取概率较高；位次接近区间上限（241名）可尝试报考，但需做好调剂准备。建议高分考生优先考虑数学、物理、计算机等A+学科方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 145, 145, 145, 161, and 159 respectively. Rankings stabilized at 145 from 2021 to 2023, slightly shifted back to 161 in 2024, and recovered slightly to 159 in 2025. Over the past two years, the overall ranking shifted back by about 14 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 159 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Chongqing: 13 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 15 in 2025, and planned 20 students in 2026, an expansion of about 33.3% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly increase admission slots and have a major impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top institutions in the country, with the highest tier of academic level and comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission gaps, and cafeteria/dormitory incidents. However, its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure and interaction on short video platforms, reflecting sustained social attention. In 2025, there was an abnormal admission signal of high attention (first vacancy in Hubei early batch), but overall it did not affect Peking University's top status. Peking University has the highest number of A+ disciplines in the country, including representative A+ disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Chemistry, Biology, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Economics, which are highly correlated with the Physics Category admission majors (Science Experimental Class, including Mathematics, etc.), with discipline strength at the national top level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended or recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application heat. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Chongqing is about 209,000, slightly lower than in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 137,000 (slightly decreased from about 139,500 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 425 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 498 points, with a steady upward trend in recent years. Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with an enrollment share in Chongqing of about 2.5% (2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment with no local bias. Chongqing examinees have a strong regional preference for universities in Beijing, and as a top institution, Peking University's appeal is not affected by region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the significant 33.3% expansion in 2026 (significantly increasing admission slots, pushing the ranking number larger), the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category examinees, and Peking University's top discipline strength and high social attention, the expansion is the most critical factor affecting the 2026 admission ranking. It is expected that the ranking will shift back from 159 in 2025 to approximately 191, with a range of 141–241.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Basic Science Majors, including Mathematics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate Difficulty)
- Science Experimental Class (Basic Science Majors, including Chemistry, Biological Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Basic Science Majors, including Geology, Environmental Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Peking University only offers one admission major in the Physics Category in Chongqing: Science Experimental Class (large category enrollment, including multiple directions such as Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Geology, and Environment). Actual admission is based on large category filing, with major selection after enrollment. The predicted ranking is approximately 191, with a range of 141–241. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (within 141) can boldly aim for it; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 191) are within the normal range, with a higher probability of admission; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (241) can try to apply but should be prepared for adjustment. It is recommended that high-scoring candidates prioritize A+ discipline directions such as Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the History Category were approximately 61st, 59th, 59th, 61st, and 66th respectively, fluctuating narrowly within the 59–66 range. The 2025 ranking of 66th is the highest (worst) in recent years, slightly shifting back by about 5 places compared to 2021, with minimal fluctuation, indicating highly stable admission rankings. The university's enrollment plan for the History Category in Chongqing: 16 students each year from 2021 to 2026, unchanged for six consecutive years, with a completely stable enrollment scale and no additional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university. It has been ranked 2nd consecutively from 2021 to 2026 on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, firmly among the top institutions in the country, with the highest level of school operation and comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission gaps, and cafeteria/dormitory incidents. However, its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high exposure and interaction on short video platforms, reflecting sustained social attention. In 2025, there was an abnormal admission signal of high attention (a gap appeared for the first time in the Hubei early batch), but overall it did not affect Peking University's top status. Peking University has the highest number of A+ disciplines in the country, with corresponding advantageous disciplines for the History Category including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Journalism and Communication A-, Sociology A+, Philosophy A+, and Archaeology A+, highly correlated with the Liberal Arts Experimental Class enrollment majors, with discipline strength at the national top level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature were recommended in the 2023–2024 major popularity analysis, with stable social application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of Chongqing ordinary college entrance examination takers is approximately 209,000, with an estimated 72,000 History Category candidates (a slight decrease from about 73,400 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line was 438 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 515 points, steadily increasing in recent years. Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with an enrollment share in Chongqing of about 2.5% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference. Chongqing candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities, and as a top institution, Peking University's appeal is unaffected by region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings within the 59–69 range, the unchanged enrollment plan for six consecutive years, the slight decrease in History Category candidates, and Peking University's top-tier discipline strength and high social attention; the unchanged enrollment plan and historical ranking stability are the most critical factors. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift back (competition slightly intensifies) compared to the 2025 baseline, approximately 66th, with a range of 49–89.
